productDisplayName: Puma Men No. 1 logo Black Track Pant
description: Composition Black track pants made of 100% polyester on the outside with an inner lining of 100% polyester till the knees and 100% nylon from the knees to the hem, has a broad elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inseam, two insert pockets on the sides, doggle straps on either sides of the hem, graphic branding above the right hem and embroidered branding below the left pocket Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash inside out with like colours using cold water Do not bleach, or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron inside out Do not iron on decorations Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, these track pants from puma make a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Crafted from a polyester/nylon blend, these pants are ideal for your Sports training, jogging sessions or just laid back weekends. The soft blended fabric keeps you dry and comfortable and the sporty look does wonders for your casual style. Pair this with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes. Model Statistics Model is a size M of height 6' and waist 28"
